caveat: measured-on-benchmark, not real traffic -- tier-hit rate is a property of this harness's own fixed workload matrix's PII density, not of real traffic (ARCHITECTURE.md, 'The cascade'). Every row below states its own concurrency level; this artifact never reports a p99 without one, per BUILD.md Phase 7. Cold start (n=10, a fresh process each time) is reported separately and is never folded into any steady-state row. A request that timed out (or otherwise failed to complete) within this run's --request-timeout ceiling is excluded from every latency percentile below and counted instead in that cell's own timeout_count/error_count -- a cell with a nonzero count completed fewer than n requests and that is itself part of the finding, not a gap silently papered over.
